filesystem._comment: Replace <YOUR_PROJECT_PATH> with your actual project directory. Claude Code has built-in file access, so this MCP server is optional.

codex._comment: OpenAI Codex CLI as MCP server. Requires `npm i -g @openai/codex` and `codex login`. Disabled by default — to enable, add "codex" to enabledMcpjsonServers in settings.local.json. See README.
